title: senecio scopolii subsp. floccosus
intro: Senecio scopolii subsp. floccosus is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the perennial plant Senecio scopolii, native to certain regions in Europe and Asia, characterized by its unique woolly leaves and stems. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio scopolii subsp. floccosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and promote overall respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its essential oils can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy.
